title: Capture Cap - RCT Version [Cobblemon]
description: Added capture cap to the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod.
body:
Another capture cap, based on the level cap system of Radical Cobblemon Trainers rather than the levels of the player's Cobblemon.

Designed to prevent players from capturing overly powerful Cobblemon early on and rushing through the game.
***
### Please do not use it together with [Cobblemon Catch Level Cap](https://modrinth.com/mod/catchlevelcap) to avoid unnecessary errors.

***
### How does it work?

Obtain a Trainer Card to view your current level cap and defeat the next required trainer to unlock a higher level cap.

By default, the `capture cap` = `level cap` + `capture level offset`. You can modify the capture level offset using an in-game command.

- `/gamerule levelCap <leveloffset>`

The new gamerules are used to bypass Master Ball and Shiny restrictions, with their default values set to `true`.
- `bypassMasterBall <true|false>`
- `bypassShiny <true|false>`


There is also a gamerule to toggle whether to display messages when a capture attempt fails.

- `showLevelCapMessages <true|false>`
***
